name: 7-day Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 gallon of water and coarse salt. Bring to a boil.
2. Pour the brine over 1 gallon sliced cucumbers. Cover with a plate to keep the cucumbers under solution. Cover with cloth; let stand for 4 days.
3. On the fifth day, drain the cucumbers well and rinse again.
4. Boil another 1/2 gallon of water with alum added. Pour over the cucumbers and let stand for 1 day.
5. On the sixth day, drain the cucumbers well.
6. Boil another 1/2 gallon of water with ginger added. Pour over the cucumbers. Let stand until ready to use.
7. On the seventh day, boil vinegar, sugar, celery seed, cloves, and cinnamon in a saucepan until boiling. Add the drained cucumbers and bring to a boil again.
8. Remove from heat and pack into sterilized jars. Seal tightly.
